overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing Night City during golden hour. The camera glides smoothly over the dense futuristic metropolis, capturing flying vehicles and massive megabuildings bathed in warm sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial overview of sprawling cyberpunk metropolis

agents.ego_description: drone hovering and slowly advancing over the city, capturing the panoramic skyline and distant mountains

entered.detail: hazy mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and towers
multi-level highway interchange with glowing traffic lines
aerial vehicle flying in the distance against the sky
tall industrial chimneys emitting faint smoke

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera floats above the dense urban sprawl, showing the mountain range on the horizon, elevated highways threading through the buildings, and flying vehicles in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: navigating between megabuildings in urban canyon

events.description: camera pans right revealing large yellow industrial megastructure
approaching the massive 06 megabuilding for close pass

agents.ego_description: drone banking right and moving forward through the urban canyon, passing close to building facades and megastructures

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving across the frame from right to left in the distance

entered.detail: tall yellow-lit industrial building with multiple platforms and scaffolding
massive residential megabuilding with prominent 06 signage and illuminated window patterns
circular landing pad structure on building roof with metallic surface
modern skyscraper with reflective glass surface catching the sunlight

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the wide panoramic view to navigating through the urban canyon, revealing a distinctive yellow industrial tower and approaching the massive 06 megabuilding. The drone moves smoothly past rooftops and glass facades while the mountain range shifts to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that transitions from a wide panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis into a focused descent through its dense urban canyons. It begins floating high above the sprawling city during golden hour, capturing elevated highways and distant flying vehicles set against a backdrop of far-off mountains. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts from the open horizon to a tighter navigation between towering glass facades and rooftops. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches a distinctive yellow industrial tower, finally steering toward the massive 06 megabuilding while the mountain range drifts to the right of the frame.
